tasks.description: Remove ORCH-001/QUALITY-001 task type generation from orchestrator config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to exclude meta-task types (ORCH-*, QUALITY-*) from taskTypePatterns array. Add blocklist: ['ORCH-', 'QUALITY-'] to prevent self-referential generation loop.

tasks.description: Remove quality gate meta-validation from config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts to disable recursive quality checks. Set enableMetaValidation: false and comment out self-assessment rules that trigger cascade failures.

tasks.description: Add execution watchdog timeout to orchestrator service
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add 90-second timeout per task execution. On timeout, mark task failed and continue to next. Prevents single stuck task from blocking entire sprint pipeline.

tasks.description: Implement cascade failure circuit breaker in orchestrator
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add circuit breaker: if 3 consecutive tasks fail with same error pattern, pause sprint and alert CEO bot. Prevents 25-task rejection cascades.

tasks.description: Validate task complexity thresholds to prevent oversized contexts
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts to enforce max 600 char context limit at generation time. Add validation that rejects tasks with multi-file scope before they enter execution queue.

tasks.description: Add sprint health metrics to CEO Telegram bot alerts
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/telegram/ceoBot.ts to add real-time alerts: sprint approval rate, avg task completion time, circuit breaker triggers. Sends proactive warning before deadlock occurs.

tasks.description: Restore 7-9 task sprint capacity in orchestrator config
tasks.context: Edit backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to increase maxTasksPerSprint from current throttled value back to 7-9 range. Only apply after blocklist/watchdog fixes prevent cascade risk.
